name: payload-vercel-mongodb-template
description: A blank template to get started with Payload 3.0

scripts.seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts tsx --env-file=.env src/scripts/seed.ts && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts tsx --env-file=.env src/scripts/seed-about.ts && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts tsx --env-file=.env src/scripts/seed-media-coverage.ts && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts tsx --env-file=.env src/scripts/seed-footer.ts && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts tsx --env-file=.env src/scripts/seed-site-settings.ts
